nasb.text: And behold, it was completely overgrown with thistles; Its surface was covered with nettles, And its stone wall was broken down.

esv.text: and behold, it was all overgrown with thorns; the ground was covered with nettles, and its stone wall was broken down.

cnv.text: 只見到處長滿蒺藜， 地面蓋滿刺草， 石牆也倒塌了。

ccb.text: 那里荆棘遍地， 刺草丛生， 石墙倒塌。

csbs.text: 看哪，那里到处长满灌木丛， 杂草遮盖地面， 石头的围墙也倒塌了！
